input.creative_direction: high-stakes reveal hook; brand gold dominant

meta.notes: Signature hook treatment. Pinned to the calibration pattern documented in the prompt: subject on slot 1 = xxlarge / sans / gold / start 3.0s / font-cycle with accel ≈ 8s. Tests hierarchy_fit (subject gets the bold treatment), slot_position_awareness (slot 1 carries the heaviest typography), timing_accuracy (start_s 3.0 is the long-hook landing), and tone_typography (energetic → bold sans + gold + font-cycle).
